title: [cross-impl] C/Zephyr schnorr48 lacks full test vector coverage vs Rust/Python
description: Reviewed last 20 commits (mostly bd auto + merges of worker fixes to schnorr files in 39c26b888 etc). Python (schnorr48.py:174-196) and Rust (schnorr.rs:289-455) run all JSON vectors incl. invalid low-order, non-canonical, truncated. C (schnorr48.c:155-195 + link_crypto/main.c:345) only does integration/frame tests, no unit test against full test/vectors/schnorr48.json. Risks undetected behavior diffs on edge cases. See existing project-LICHEN-ijsr for validation gaps. --priority 1 --type bug
